creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to update or install ports/security/pam_ldap on  FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT/amd64 (running boxes as well as newly installed ones) for usage in an OpenLDAP environment results in the following error:

checking whether ldap_set_rebind_proc takes 3 arguments... 3
configure: creating ./config.status
config.status: creating Makefile
config.status: creating config.h
config.status: executing depfiles commands
===>  Building for pam_ldap-1.8.5
 cd . && automake-1.9 --gnu 
automake-1.9: not found
gmake: *** [Makefile.in] Error 1
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/pam_ldap.

How-To-Repeat: Try to install or update security/pam_ldap
